content.en:
Xinggu Giant City.

"I didn't expect that Black Silence Dao Ancestor to end up like this so quickly!"

Ye Tian had long expected such an end for the Black Lonely Dao Ancestor, after all, even if it was a half-step Eightfold Origin Ancestor, he was far from being invincible.

Even if the Black Silence Dao Ancestor really comprehended the Extreme Yuan Dao, maybe he would be found by a certain extremely powerful Yae Origin Ancestor and then killed.

Therefore, the fate of the Black Lonely Dao Ancestor is not unexpected.

Of course, the Black Lonely Dao Ancestor was just a gamble, but unfortunately he lost the bet.

......

At the boundary of a certain community in the Hanhai District, the Black Lonely Dao Ancestor escaped here, tried his best to hide his breath, and also shielded and probed with a treasure on his body.

But he knew very well that he couldn't hide for long.

"Without the Dao Fruit, I can't even activate the Yuan Dao now, and my cultivation is only equivalent to a half-step sixfold ancestor. Even with his powerful physical body, it is comparable to the combat power of a half-step sevenfold ancestor, but it is still too weak, any sevenfold ancestor can kill me in seconds! Not to mention those half-step eightfold ancestors, one look from the other party is enough to make me fall!"

The Black Silence Dao Ancestor knew that he couldn't stay here any longer, otherwise he would be discovered sooner or later.

"You must leave the boundary of the Hanhai District!"

Black Silence Dao Ancestor thought to himself.

But if he goes to other regions now, he can't do it at all, and he will definitely be discovered.

"I can only truncate the other end of Montenegro by truncating Montenegro, it is said that there is also a boundary at the other end of Montenegro, although it is far from being comparable to the boundary of Hanhai District, but it is more suitable for me to hide. "

Immediately, the Black Silent Dao Ancestor immediately retreated into the Silent Black Sea again.

His speed was very slow now, and in desperation, he used some kind of speeding treasure, which only sped up.

It didn't take long for him to come to the Truncated Black Mountain.

"Cutting off some of the original antiquities of Montenegro is indeed very powerful, I have to use that treasure!"

If the Black Lonely Dao Ancestor found the safest route, he could also rely on his own strength to pass through, but he had never learned about cutting off Black Mountain before, so he didn't know which route was the safest.

Therefore, he could only choose a random route, but his current strength was very weak, and he couldn't beat many of the primordial antiquities that cut off Montenegro.

Airplanes!!!

A black leaf appeared on the Black Silent Dao Ancestor, and after this black leaf appeared, his body began to change slightly.

In the eyes of the Primordial Antiquity, he is a Primordial Antiquity.

This piece could hide his identity, but it didn't last long.

However, it is not a problem for him to pass the truncation of Montenegro.

Soon.

The Black Silence Dao Ancestor passed through the Cutting off Black Mountain, and none of the primordial antiquities along the way attacked him.

......

"Finally came to the boundary of this area, there is a barrier to cut off the Black Mountain, even the Hanhai Palace can't detect my existence, but they may guess that I crossed the Truncated Black Mountain. However, the Hanhai Boundary Map of the Hanhai Palace can only play an unimaginable role in the Hanhai District Boundary, if you come here, the Hanhai Boundary Map is useless, and it is almost unrealistic to rely on the Hanhai Boundary Map to find me. "

The Black Silent Dao Ancestor turned into a black light and shuttled through the Silent Black Sea, and he was going to swallow some Dao Ancestors first to recover from his injuries.

For him, it was easier to regain his strength by swallowing some Dao Ancestors than by eating any treasure.

If there were enough Dao Ancestors for him to devour, it would not be impossible to restore the Dao Fruit.

It's just that he doesn't have a Dao Fruit now, so he can't urge the Yuan Dao, and the speed of devouring and consuming a Dao Ancestor is very slow, and it takes a long time to swallow a Dao Ancestor.

"Let's kill the Sixfold Peak Ancestor first!"

The Black Silence Dao Ancestor soon came to a community realm, and his will instantly probed the entire community realm.

"What, there is not a single sixfold peak ancestor, and the strongest person is only in the middle stage of the sixfold primordial ancestor, how can there be such a weak community realm?"

The Black Silent Dao Ancestor was dumbfounded.

It's no wonder that the Dao Ancestors of the Hanhai District Realm don't care much about here, and they don't have any information here, it turns out that this place is too weak!

"The middle stage of the Sixfold Primordial Ancestor is too weak, even if I swallow the entire living beings of the community realm, I will not be able to recover, and if I swallow them all, it will undoubtedly expose my existence, continue to search!"

The Black Lonely Daozu quickly left this community realm and went to other community realms.

I searched again and again, and after searching for several community boundaries, I didn't find the Dao Ancestor at the peak of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor, nor did I find the Dao Ancestor at the level of the half-step Sevenfold Origin Ancestor.

The Black Silence Dao Ancestor came to a community realm again, and finally found a Dao Ancestor who was at the peak of the Sixfold Origin Ancestor.

"Hahaha, I finally found a sixfold primordial peak, and it seems that I have also touched the prototype of the Yuan Dao, which is not bad, swallow him directly, and recover a little strength. "

......

"What's going on, why do you feel palpitations?"

Shocking Dao Ancestor's face changed slightly, and he tried to calculate, but he couldn't calculate anything.

He suspected that a strong person was eyeing him, but with his current strength, if the half-step Sevenfold Ancestor didn't make a move, he would be almost invincible!

Abrupt.

A black hand caught.

"Not good!"

Shocking Dao Ancestor was terrified, he tried to resist this black hand, but he couldn't.

This black hand does not contain the power of the Yuan Dao, but the power contained in itself suppresses everything, so that the prototype of the Yuan Dao is suppressed.

In an instant, the Shock Killing Dao Ancestor was captured by the black hand, swallowed directly into the body of the Black Silence Dao Ancestor, and then slowly refined.

Subsequently.

The Shock Killing Dao Ancestor left this community realm, went to another community realm, hid it, and slowly absorbed and refined the Shock Killing Dao Ancestor.

At the same time, he also took out a lot of precious resources to refine and restore his strength and Dao Fruit.

But it will take a long time for it to fully recover.

The years passed.

The disappearance of the Shock Killing Dao Ancestor did not cause any repercussions.

Although later, many Dao Ancestors knew that the Shock Killing Dao Ancestor was missing and could not be contacted, and confirmed the fall of the Shock Killing Dao Ancestor, but they only guessed whether the Shock Killing Dao Ancestor had provoked a powerful primordial artifact, so they were killed.

But after a long time, the half-step sixfold peak ancestor disappeared, which aroused the suspicion of some Dao ancestors.

......

Hanhai District Boundary.

The Dao Ancestors of the Hanhai Palace have been using the Hanhai Boundary Map, but they have not found the Black Lonely Dao Ancestor.

"The cultivation of the Black Silent Dao Ancestor is no more, and it can still be hidden?"

"Could it be that you have already left the boundary of the Hanhai District?"

"We have arranged a large number of Dao Ancestors in several places where we have left the boundary of the Hanhai District, and if the Black Lonely Dao Ancestor wants to leave, he will not be able to hide it from us at all. "

"There is another possibility, that is, the Black Silence Dao Ancestor left the boundary of the Hanhai District, and by cutting off the Black Mountain, he went to the boundary of the community on the side of the Black Mountain. There are still many community boundaries over there, and if the Black Lonely Dao Ancestor is hidden there, the Hanhai Boundary Map will not be able to find him at all. "

"Then send a Dao Ancestor over to investigate, but the Hanhai Boundary Map can't exert an effect over there, even if we look for it, we may not be able to find the Black Silence Dao Ancestor!"

"Try it, you might find it!"

Subsequently, the Hanhai Palace sent several Sevenfold Dao Ancestors through the Truncated Black Mountain.
